description: Reusable startup gate for A-share CN stock factor mining on office/high-spec desktops.

research_direction.mandate: Mine tradable A-share stock cross-sectional alpha factors; do not evaluate this run as ETF rotation.

stage_policy.discovery: Use candidate design and quick screens only to pre-register economic hypotheses; do not claim profitability from short discovery windows.
stage_policy.long_cycle_replay: Before new promotion claims, replay historical candidates and parameters unchanged across the available long cycle, default 2015-01-01 through 2025-12-31 for CN stock authority data.
stage_policy.validation: Use rolling walk-forward train/test folds, regime coverage, costs, capacity, overlap-aware statistics, and cumulative multiple-testing accounting before any candidate can advance.
stage_policy.final_holdout: Use 2026 data, when available, as a read-once final holdout only after long-cycle replay and OOS validation clear; never tune after reading it.

long_cycle_replay.purpose: same-parameter replay and cycle/regime coverage audit before new mining claims

same_parameter_full_sample.purpose: diagnostic full-sample rerun with frozen parameters; not promotion evidence by itself

discovery.purpose: legacy candidate discovery only; short-window evidence must be replayed across long cycle before use

final_holdout.purpose: final recent holdout; do not tune after reading it

risk_tolerance.reason: User can tolerate roughly 30% drawdown when return quality is strong, but this does not waive capacity, extreme-trade, cost, or execution gates.
